summary: Intelligent Stop Manager (Advanced Smart Stop) - All 32 backend API tests passed. Fixed 2 bugs found during code review. All endpoints working: GET /setup-rules (8 types), GET /trailing-modes (6 modes), GET /urgency-levels (4 levels), POST /calculate (all features), POST /analyze-trade (stop analysis).

features_verified.GET /api/intelligent-stops/setup-rules: PASS - Returns 8 setup types with descriptions: breakout, pullback, mean_reversion, momentum, gap_and_go, vwap_reversal, earnings_play, default
features_verified.GET /api/intelligent-stops/trailing-mode: PASS - Returns 6 trailing modes: none, atr, percent, chandelier, breakeven_plus, parabolic
features_verified.GET /api/intelligent-stops/urgency-level: PASS - Returns 4 urgency levels: normal, caution, high_alert, emergency
features_verified.POST /api/intelligent-stops/calculate_br: PASS - Breakout setup returns chandelier trailing mode
features_verified.POST /api/intelligent-stops/calculate_mo: PASS - Momentum setup returns parabolic trailing mode
features_verified.POST /api/intelligent-stops/calculate_lo: PASS - Low float/volume (5M shares, 200K vol) triggers HIGH hunt risk
features_verified.Layered stops with 3 levels: PASS - Returns layered_stops array with 3 levels at progressively deeper ATR depths
features_verified.Scale-out plan with profit targets: PASS - Returns scale_out_plan with R-target prices and exit percentages
features_verified.Regime adjustment applied: PASS - regime_adjustment field present (1.0 default when regime service unavailable)
features_verified.Short position calculation: PASS - Stop above entry price for shorts
features_verified.Support/resistance levels: PASS - Factors considered includes swing/support levels when provided
features_verified.POST /api/intelligent-stops/analyze-trad: PASS - Returns current_stop vs optimal_stop with recommendations

bugs_fixed.issue: List comprehension used undefined variable 'l' instead of 'lvl'
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed `[round(l, 2) for lvl in lvn_levels[:5]]` to `[round(lvl, 2) for lvl in lvn_levels[:5]]`
Changed `except Exception:` to `except Exception as e:`

critical_code_review_comments: IntelligentStopManager correctly implements all 8 setup types with appropriate trailing modes per setup
Stop hunt detection correctly identifies HIGH risk when float < 10M shares AND avg_volume < 500K
Layered stops correctly split position 40/30/30 at ATR depths 1.0/1.5/2.0
Scale-out plan correctly calculates R-multiple profit targets based on setup rules
Regime adjustment multipliers correctly defined: CONFIRMED_DOWN long = 1.4x, short = 0.85x
Anti-hunt buffer (0.5 ATR) correctly applied when hunt risk is HIGH
Round number avoidance implemented with 0.2% buffer
Min/max stop distance constraints (default 2-8%) properly enforced

mocked_apis.note: Sector service and regime service return limited data when external services unavailable, but core functionality works

context_for_next_testing_agent: Intelligent Stop Manager at /app/backend/services/intelligent_stop_manager.py fully tested. All 8 setup types (breakout, pullback, mean_reversion, momentum, gap_and_go, vwap_reversal, earnings_play, default) working correctly with their respective trailing modes. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_intelligent_stop_manager.py covers all endpoints and business logic. Two bugs were fixed during testing (variable name typo in LVN calculation, undefined exception variable in router).
